title: elaeocarpus kusaiensis
intro: Elaeocarpus kusaiensis, also known as the Kosrae silver dollar tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with this plant include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Elaeocarpus kusaiensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine.
